title: Formulation for intimate hygiene comprising extract of vitex agnus-castus and usnea barbata and aerosol spray package for use thereof
abstract: Topical composition comprising an aqueous-based formulation including an extract of Vitex agnus-castus and an extract of Usnea barbata for use in the treatment of intimate discomfort related to vaginal disorders, and aerosol spray packaging comprising it.
claims:
Claims 1 . A topical composition comprising a water-based formulation comprising an extract of Vitex agnus-castus and an extract of Usnea barbata for use in the treatment of intimate discomforts related to vaginal disorders, wherein said composition comprises up to 0.1 % by weight of said extract of Vitex agnus-castus with respect to the total weight of the composition, and comprises from 0.1 % to 0.001 % of extract of Usnea barbata expressed as weight percentage of usnic acid with respect to the total weight of the composition. 2. The topical composition for use according to claim 1 , wherein said intimate discomforts related to vaginal disorders are selected from the group consisting of irritation, redness, burning, itching, leakage, unpleasant odor, vaginal dryness, pain during sexual activity. 3. The topical composition for use according to claim 1 , wherein said composition comprises up to 0.05% by weight of said Vitex agnus-castus extract with respect to the total weight of the composition. 4. The topical composition for use according to claim 3, wherein said composition comprises at least 0.001 %, preferably at least 0.005% by weight of said Vitex agnus- castus extract with respect to the total weight of said composition. 5. The topical composition for use according to claim 1 , wherein said extract of Usnea barbata is a dry extract in powder form comprising usnic acid, usnates (in particular metal usnates) and mixtures thereof, preferably sodium usnate, copper usnate and mixtures thereof, more preferably copper usnate. 6. The topical composition for use according to claim 5, wherein said composition comprises from 0.05% to 0.005%, of extract of Usnea barbata expressed as a weight percentage of usnic acid with respect to the total weight of the composition. 7. The topical composition for use according to claim 1 , wherein said composition comprises additional natural active ingredients, preferably natural extracts, more preferably an extract selected from the group consisting of extract of prickly pear (Opuntia Ficus-lndica), extract of ginger root (Zingiber officinale), extract of sage (Salvia officinalis), extract of thyme (Thymus vulgaris), extract of chamomile (Camomile recutita), extract of Horopito (Pseudowintera colorata), oil of St. John's wort (Hypericum perforatum), preferably extract of prickly pear (Opuntia Ficus- lndica) and extract of ginger root (Zingiber officinale). 8. The topical composition for use according to claim 7, wherein said composition comprises a total amount of said additional natural active ingredients between about 0.0001 % and about 1%, more preferably between 0.0005% and 0.5% by weight with respect to the total weight of the composition. 9. The topical composition for use according to claim 1 , wherein said composition comprises prebiotics, preferably prebiotics selected from the group consisting of inulin, alpha-glucan oligosaccharides, fructo-oligosaccharides (FOS), galactooligosaccharides (GOS), isomalto-oligosaccharides (IMO), xylo-oligosaccharides (XOS), long-chain alpha and beta-glucans, glucomannan oligosaccharides, lactulose (a synthetic sugar), glycogen, and lactic acid, preferably inulin and alphaglucan oligosaccharides. 10. The topical composition for use according to claim 9, wherein said composition comprises a total amount of said prebiotics between about 0.1 % and about 10%, more preferably between 0.5% and 5%, and even more preferably between 0.5% and 2% by weight with respect to the total weight of the composition. 1 1 . An aerosol spray packaging comprising a topical composition comprising an aqueous-based formulation comprising an extract of Vitex agnus-castus and an extract of Usnea barbata contained in a container (50) under pressure with finely nebulized spray delivery, wherein said delivery can be effected in the upside down position, wherein said composition comprises up to 0.1 % by weight of said extract of Vitex agnus-castus with respect to the total weight of the composition, and 

comprises from 0.1 % to 0.001% of extract of Usnea barbata expressed as weight percentage of usnic acid with respect to the total weight of the composition. 12. The aerosol spray packaging according to claim 1 1 , wherein said container (50) is made of plastic, preferably polyester, transparent or opaque, colorless or colored. 13. The aerosol spray packaging according to claim 1 1 , wherein said container (50) is able to withstand pressures up to 15 bar, preferably up to 12 bar, more preferably up to 10 bar. 14. The aerosol spray packaging according to claim 13, wherein said container (50) is able to withstand pressures of at least 3 bar, preferably at least 4 bar, more preferably at least 6 bar. 15. The aerosol spray packaging according to claim 1 1 , wherein said container (50) comprises a tank (55) to contain said topical composition, a pressure chamber (54), and a dispensing valve (51 ) . 16. The aerosol spray packaging according to claim 1 1 , wherein said dispensing valve (51 ) comprises an outlet orifice (56) with a diameter of less than 1 mm, preferably less than 0.5 mm, and preferably between 0.4 and 0.1 mm. 17. The aerosol spray packaging according to claim 1 1 , wherein said pressure chamber (54) is filled with a gas, preferably air, at a pressure between 3 and 15 bar, preferably between 4 and 12 bar, more preferably between 6 and 10 bar.
